Key.English: Lets AI commanders run artillery fire missions. This module controls how artillery behaves, but does not place any guns itself - just like the Military Air Component Commander does not place aircraft. It needs artillery batteries to exist in the world: enable "Place artillery units" on a Military Placement module (or "Artillery Count" on a Custom Objective), or place and profile artillery in the editor. Fire missions are throttled by battery cooldowns, limited ammunition, extra dispersion and targeting rules. Place one module per mission; it serves every AI commander.
Log battery registry, fire mission decisions and results to the RPT.

One setting that scales everything: how often each battery may fire, shell spread, rounds per mission, how many enemy contacts are needed before a strike is called, and battery ammunition stocks. Low keeps artillery an occasional threat; High makes it a constant presence.
